status: DEV — clinician_review pending; NOT patient-facing; NOT a clinical source until FL-30 Step 5 sign-off. Precautions / general warnings — mild/common side effects + general cautions (below serious_adverse_effects and strong_contraindications). Reference register (context), NOT an engine gate. Records author to review_status 'draft'.

attestation.recorded_by: claude-fable-5 (agent, on clinician KL explicit sign-off)
attestation.statement: Clinician (KL) DATASET-LEVEL clinical sign-off, recorded 2026-07-14. KL directed the authoring (multi-agent + adversarial verification, or curated seed) and attests the records at dataset level, having reviewed representative samples and the methodology — NOT an exhaustive line-by-line review of every record. Clinical sign-off only; regulatory (TGA) sign-off NOT provided; datasets remain -dev and NOT patient-facing. Self-authored/AMH-aligned; corroborate against AMH/TGA before any live use.
